summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AlphaAI Fund Platform MVP Simulation features. All critical simulation functionality is working properly including paper trading, agent coordination, logging, and strategy deployment.

minor_bugs.impact: Non-critical - market data display feature missing
Minor - paper trading toggle via API not working

working_endpoints: /api/simulation/logs - Trade, risk, allocation, strategy, agent events
/api/risk/portfolio-status - Risk engine status and drawdown monitoring

missing_features.issue: Rebalance Capital button not found with expected test-id
Refresh Data button not found with expected test-id

passed_tests: Start Simulation button works - starts paper trading mode
Run Trade Cycle executes trades for active strategies
Simulation logs display trade, risk, allocation, strategy, agent events
Agent interactions are logged and displayed (20+ interactions found)
Navigation between simulation and other pages works
Backend API endpoints for simulation management (87.8% success rate)
Risk engine monitoring and status reporting
Paper trading execution and portfolio management
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Implement missing market data endpoints (/api/market/top-coins, /api/market/chart) 2) Fix paper trading toggle endpoint method 3) Add missing test-ids for rebalance and refresh buttons. All critical simulation functionality is working properly.
